'''Doman Beruss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the [[Illodia sector/Legends|Illodia sector]] under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. His aunt was another [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]], the senator of [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

==Biography==
He was a close friend of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], and was a reliable supporter of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] while she was [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. That changed, however, during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], when Beruss served as chairman of the [[Ministry Council]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was captured en-route to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], Beruss moved for a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|Vote of No Confidence]] against Organa, fearing that she might rush to conflict with the [[Yevetha]] just to save Han. While Beruss's intentions were good, the vote strained his friendship with Organa.

Doman had a son, [[Avan Beruss|Avan]], who was a member of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].
